prompt_sent: [{'type': 'text', 'text': 'That XML failed Scilab validation with this error:\nscicos_simulate: Error during block parameters update.\nStudy the error carefully. Then output the COMPLETE corrected XML.'}]
ai_response_raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<XcosDiagram>
  <!-- 
    CRITICAL FIXES:
    1. RAMP: Model rpar is 3 elements [slope; start_time; initial_value].
    2. CSCOPE: 
       - rpar must be [0; ymin; ymax; period] (4 elements).
       - ipar must be 15 elements: [window_number; 1; buffer_size; color1; color2; ...; color8; win_pos_x; win_pos_y; win_dim_w; win_dim_h].
       - The Scicos structure requires specific field types for rpar and ipar (as column vectors).
  -->
  <Block as="RAMP" name="RAMP" id="1">
    <Graphics position="[100, 100]" dimension="[40, 40]" exprs="['0.1'; '0'; '0']"/>
    <Model sim="list('ramp', 4)" in="[]" out="1" rpar="[0.1; 0; 0]" blockType="c"/>
  </Block>
  <Block as="CSCOPE" name="CSCOPE" id="2">
    <Graphics position="[300, 100]" dimension="[40, 40]" exprs="['1 3 5 7 9 11 13 15'; '-1'; '[]'; '[]'; '-15'; '15'; '30'; '20'; '0'; '']"/>
    <Model sim="list('cscope', 4)" in="-1" in2="1" evtin="1" rpar="[0; -15; 15; 30]" ipar="[-1; 1; 20; 1; 3; 5; 7; 9; 11; 13; 15; -1; -1; 600; 400]" blockType="c"/>
  </Block>
  <Block as="CLOCK_c" name="CLOCK_c" id="3">
    <Graphics position="[320, 20]" dimension="[20, 20]" exprs="['0.1'; '0']"/>
    <Model sim="list('genmtime', 4)" out="[]" evtout="1" rpar="[0.1; 0]" blockType="d"/>
  </Block>
  <Link from="1" to="2" type="explicit" id="4">
    <Geometry x="[140, 300]" y="[120, 120]"/>
  </Link>
  <Link from="3" to="2" type="command" id="5">
    <Geometry x="[330, 320]" y="[40, 100]"/>
  </Link>
</XcosDiagram>
